desc: Independent cross-review of ticket 001's built RX BIT(1)/TX-poll diagnostic per AGENT_ONBOARDING §6: verify exact image/DT/initramfs hashes, that the MMIO delta stays inside dockchannel-uart's safe +0xc000/+0x28000 windows (DEVLOG MMIO caution), the RX-cap-1000/hard-disable-1024 logic, and the pre-registered interpretation matrix (done/2026-07-14-t6040-dockchannel-rxirq-txpoll.md); record the reviewer in 001.
